## defineConstraint() function

Defines a custom constraint registration. Currently an identity function that provides type-checking and IDE autocompletion.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function defineConstraint(reg: CustomConstraintRegistration): CustomConstraintRegistration;
```
